name: sitetrace-api-suite
description: SiteTrace API Suite - 35 endpoints, single deployment

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const d of fs.readdirSync('.')) { const p=d+'/index.js'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) require('child_process').execFileSync(process.execPath, ['--check', p], {stdio:'inherit'}); }"
